summary: Iteration 14: New Partner Features Testing - Route calculation, available rides, Stripe card management. All 12 backend tests PASSED. All frontend UI flows verified working including Google Maps autocomplete, route display, and Stripe checkout redirect.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - React setState in render issue in DriverLogin (non-critical)

calculate_route_success.details: POST /api/partner/calculate-route returns distance (text/meters), duration (text/seconds), start_address, end_address from Google Directions API

calculate_route_auth.details: Endpoint requires partner JWT auth (401 without token)

available_rides_list.details: GET /api/partner/available-rides returns pending rides from OTHER partners

available_rides_excludes_own.details: Available rides correctly exclude current partner's own rides

ride_detail.details: GET /api/partner/rides/{id} returns single ride with all fields

stripe_add_card.details: POST /api/partner/payment/add-card creates Stripe checkout session, returns valid checkout.stripe.com URL

stripe_card_status.details: GET /api/partner/payment/card-status/{session_id} returns session status and payment_status

frontend_dashboard_stats.details: Dashboard shows 4 stats: Total (6), Attente (4), Acceptees (2), Dispo (0)

frontend_profile_icon.details: Profile icon in header navigates to /driver/profile

frontend_tabs.details: Mes Courses / Disponibles tabs switch content correctly

frontend_ride_card_click.details: Clicking ride card navigates to /driver/ride/:id detail page

frontend_ride_detail.details: Ride detail shows status, itinerary with distance (31.7 km) and duration (44 mins), vehicle, price, passenger details

frontend_profile_card_mgmt.details: Profile page shows partner info and Stripe card management section with 'Ajouter une Carte' button

frontend_stripe_redirect.details: 'Ajouter une Carte' button redirects to Stripe checkout (€1.00 auth charge page)

frontend_google_autocomplete.details: Create ride form has Google Maps autocomplete on address inputs, shows 'powered by Google' suggestions

frontend_route_calculation.details: Route calculation displays distance and duration after entering addresses (29.9 km, 43 mins)

critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints properly secured with partner JWT auth
Google Directions API integration working with GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY env var
Stripe emergentintegrations library working with sk_test_emergent key
Route calculation includes overview_polyline for potential map display
Card setup uses €1 auth charge pattern (standard for card verification)
Minor React warning in DriverLogin about setState during render - non-blocking
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed rides created during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new partner features working: route calculation via Google Directions API, available rides from other partners, Stripe card management with checkout redirect. Frontend mobile PWA design clean with proper UX. Google Maps autocomplete integrated on CreateRide form. No mocked APIs - all real integrations (Google Directions, Stripe).

mocked_api.note: No APIs mocked. Google Directions API and Stripe checkout are real integrations.
